source_identity.title: Towards developing a theory of generic teaching quality
source_identity.authors: ['Anna-Katharina Praetorius', 'Eckhard Klieme', 'Thilo Kleickmann', 'Esther Brunner', 'Anke Lindmeier', 'Sandy Taut', 'Charalambos Charalambous']
source_identity.apa_reference: Praetorius, A.-K., Klieme, E., Kleickmann, T., Brunner, E., Lindmeier, A., Taut, S., & Charalambous, C. (2020). Towards developing a theory of generic teaching quality: Origin, current status, and necessary next steps regarding the Three Basic Dimensions Model. In A.-K. Praetorius, J. Gruenkorn, & E. Klieme (Eds.), Empirische Forschung zu Unterrichtsqualitaet (Zeitschrift fuer Paedagogik, Beiheft 66, pp. 15-36). Beltz Juventa. https://doi.org/10.25656/01:25861

retrieval_preferences.citation_policy: Use ARA/API for retrieval and synthesis; reopen raw PDF or high-quality Markdown/TEI for exact quotes, statistics, page numbers, and final bibliographic details.
